subject: Streamlining operations across your AZ locations
body:
Hi,

I was checking out The HVAC Company's website and noticed you have offices in Mesa, Prescott, and Flagstaff. Managing service requests across multiple locations is no small task.

We help multi-location service businesses automate dispatching, so requests get routed to the right office automatically. We also set up customer portals where clients can check job status without calling your team.

Would a quick 10-minute call this week make sense? I'd love to hear how you're handling coordination today.

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
